135 _39ND CMPRHNSN_DSCHRG_CD (39Nd) Communication - Comprehension: Discharge CHAR 2 A score indicating the patient's ability to comprehend at discharge. Comprehension includes understanding of either auditory or visual communication (for example, writing,
